verses.text: Tua ciangin Israel mite khempeuh, Gilead gam zong a kihel, Dan panin Beersheba dong hong kuankhia uh a, Topa' kiang Mizpah-ah mihing khat bangin mihon hong kikhawm lian uh hi
Israel minam khempeuh sung pan makai khempeuh, namsau tawi khe galkap mihing tul za li, Pasian' mite' kikhopna-ah amau mahmah kipia uh hi
(Tu-in Israel mite Mizpah-ah a paina thu Benjamin mite in za uh hi.) Israel mite in, “Hih bang tatsiatna hong pian'na thu hong gen in,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin a kithat numei' pasal, Levi mipa in dawngin, “Benjamin-te' gam Gibeah-ah kei leh ka zineu a taam dingin ka tung uh hi
Tua ciangin Gibeah mite kei' langah hong pang uh a, zanin kote' omna inn hong umcih uh hi. Amaute in kei hong that nuam uh a, ka zineu buangawpin tu-in amah si hi
Tua ciangin ka zineu la-in ka semnen a, Israel-te' luah gamsung khempeuhah ka hong hawm hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Israel-te' lakah kihhuaina leh lanluat khialhna gamta uh hi
En un, no Israel mihingte khempeuh aw, na ngaihsutna uh gen un la, hih lai-ah kikum un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin mi khempeuh mihing khat bangin ding lianin, “Eite khempeuh khat zong i puanbukah pailoin, eite khat zong i inn-ah i ciah kei ding hi
Tu-in Gibeah tungah eite' hih ding thu in: Tua khua a sim dingin aisanna tawh i pai ding a

amaute in Israel-te sungah lanluatna tawh a khialhna uh hangin Benjamin-te' gam Gibeah a thuk theihna dingun mite-a' ding annek tuidawn a pua dingin Israel minamte khempeuh sung panin mi za khat sung pan mihing sawm, tul khat sung pan za khat, tul sawm sung pan tul khat i la ding hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin khuapi a sim dingin Israel mite khempeuh kikhawm uh a, kipawlin mi khat a bang uh hi
Tua ciangin Israel minamte in Benjamin minam khempeuh kiangah mi sawl uh a, “Note' lakah a piang thu pen bangzah tatsiatna ahi hiam

Tua ahih ciangin tu-in kote in amaute thatin Israel-te' sung panin siatna ka phiatkhiat theihna dingun Gibeah khuasunga om a mi ginalote hong piakhia un,” a ci uh hi. Ahih hangin Benjamin-te in a sanggam uh Israel mite' thu ngailo uh hi
Tua ciangin Israel mite do-in a kuankhia dingin Benjamin gamsung khuapite panin Gibeah khuapi-ah hong kituah uh hi
Benjamin mite in tua ni-in amau' khuapite panin, Gibeah-ah a teng a kitengkhia mihing za sagih banah, namsau a tawi mihing tul sawmnih leh tul guk a khawm uh hi
Hihte khempeuh lakah mi a kitengkhia a veikhoi za sagih om a, amaute khempeuh pen suang tawh samzang kapin a khiallote ahi uh hi
Israel mite in Benjamin-te simloh, namsau a tawi mihing tul za li khawm uh a, hih mite khempeuh galsiam mi ahi uh hi
Israel mite dingin Bethel-ah paito uh a, “Benjamin mite a sim dingin kua pai masa ding ka hi uh hiam?” ci-in Pasian a dong uh hi. Topa in, “Judah minamte paito masa ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Israel mite zingsangin tho-in Gibeah khua a sim dingin giahphual a sat uh hi
Tua ciangin Benjamin mite a sim dingin Israel mite kuankhia uh hi. Israel mite in Benjamin mite a sim dingin Gibeah-ah a gualin va naih uh hi
Benjamin mite Gibeah pan hong kuankhia-in tua ni-in Israel mite tul sawmnih leh tul nih lei-ah a tuksak uh hi
Ahih hangin Israel mite kihanthawnin a ni masa ni-a a pan'na mun mah uhah gal pangkik uh hi

Tua ciangin Israel mite paito-in nitak dong Topa' mai-ah a kap uh hi. Amaute in Topa' kiangah thu dongin, “Ka sanggam uh Benjamin mite a sim dingin gal phualah ka naihkik ding uh hiam?” a ci uh hi. Topa in, “Amaute a sim dingin kuanto un,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Israel mite a ni nih ni-in Benjamin mite a sim dingin hong nai uh hi
Amaute a sim dingin a ni nih ni-in Gibeah panin Benjamin-te hong kuankhia uh a, Israel mite tul sawm leh tul giat lei-ah tuksak uh hi. Hih a site khempeuh namsau a tawi mite ahi hi

Tua ciangin Israel mite khempeuh, galkap vekpi paito-in Bethel-ah tungin a kap uh hi. Tua lai mun Topa' mai-ah amaute tu-in nitak dong tua ni an tang uh a, Topa' mai-ah meihal biakna leh thunuama biakna a pia uh hi
Israel mite in Topa thu dong uh a (bang hang hiam cih leh tua hunin Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang tua lai-ah om a

Aaron' tapa Eleazar' tapa Finehas in tua lai-ah tua hunin na sem hi), “Ka sanggam uh Benjamin mite a sim dingin kuankik lai ding ka hi uh hiam, tua ahih kei leh khawl ding ka hi uh hiam?” a ci uh hi. Topa in, “Paito un; bang hang hiam cih leh zing ciangin amaute na khutsung uhah kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te in Gibeah kiimah a pangsim dingin mi koih uh hi
Israel mite a ni thum ni-in Benjamin mite a sim dingin kuanto uh a, a hun dangte-a mah bangin Gibeah langkhatah pang uh hi

Tua ciangin amaute a do dingin Benjamin mite hong kuankhia uh a, khuapi panin amaute kipaikhia sak hi. A hun dangte-a mah bangin amaute in Bethel lamah a paito pen leh Gibeah lamah a pai lam lianpi, leh gamlakah Israel mite sawmthum bang that uh hi
Tua ciangin Benjamin mite in, “A masa-a mah bangin i mai-ah amaute tai uh hi,” a ci uh hi. Ahih hangin Israel mite in, “Eite tai-in, khuapi panin lam lianpi-ah amaute paikhiasak ni,” a kici uh ahi hi
Israel mite khempeuh amau' omna mun panin dingin Baaltamar-ah a gualin pang uh hi. A pangsim Israel mite Gibeah nitumna lam amau omna panin hong dingkhia uh hi
Gibeah khua a sim dingin Israel-te khempeuh sung pan a kitengkhia mi tul sawm hong kuan uh a, a galdo uh haksa mahmah hi. Ahih hangin Benjamin mite in amau-a' dingin siatna a naina thu theilo uh hi
Tua ciangin Israel-te mai-ah Topa in Benjamin-te a zo hi. Israel mite in tua ni-in Benjamin mite tul sawmnih leh tul nga leh za khat that uh a, hih a site khempeuh namsau a tawi mite ahi uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Benjamin mite in a guallelhna uh kimu uh hi. Israel mite in Benjamin mite awn uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Gibeah khua a sim dingin a koih uh a pangsimte muang uh hi
Tua ciangin a pangsim mite manlangin hong pai-in Gibeah khua sungah lut uh a, a pangsim mite in namsau tawh khuapi mi khempeuh vatgawp uh hi
Israel mite leh a pangsim mite a kiciamna lim in, amaute in khuapi sung panin meikhu lianpi a suahsak toh uh ciangin

Israel mite galsim dingin hong tum ding uh hi. Tu-in Benjamin mite in Israel mite sawmthum bang vatgawpin thah ding kipan uh hi. Amaute in, “A masa-a mah bangin eite' mai-ah amaute kivattuk gawp taktak hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin amau' kiciamna lim meikhu khuapi sung panin suakto dingin a kipat ciangin Benjamin mite nunghei uh a, a khuapi bup a khu-in vantungah a kahto a mu uh hi
Tua ciangin Israel mite hong kilehhei uh a, Benjamin mite lungkia uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amau' siatna ding a naina thei uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Israel-te' mai panin amaute kileh kikin gamlak lam manawh uh hi. Ahih hangin gal in amaute pha a, khuapi sung panin hong paikhia mite in amaute leh a pawlte uh kikalsung tengah amaute sumai uh hi
Amaute in Nohah panin nisuahna lamah Gibeah gal ciangdong Benjamin mite delhin tuancilin vatgawp uh hi
Benjamin mite sung pan galhang mihing tul sawm leh tul giat tuk uh hi
Tua ciangin a dangte kihei-in sehnel gam lam Rimmon Suangpi-ah tai uh hi. Amaute mihing tul nga lam lianpi dungah si uh a, Gidom ciangdong nakpi takin amaute kidelhin tul nih kithat hi
Tua ahih ciangin tua ni-in Benjamin-te a si khempeuh, namsau a tawi galhang mihing tul sawmnih leh tul nga ahi hi
Ahih hangin mihing za guk kihei-in gamlak lam Rimmon Suangpi-ah tai uh a, Rimmon Suangpi-ah kha li sung om uh hi
Tua ciangin Benjamin mite a sim dingin Israel mite kithawi kik uh a, namsau tawh a mi a sa-in a muh khempeuh uh vatgawp uh hi. A muh uh khuate khempeuh mei tawh a hal uh hi.
